pokemon:orthworm.name: Orthworm
pokemon:orthworm.summary: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.
This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches.
